What we offer

Services

Full-stack software development from idea to production — custom, scalable and AI-ready.

Web Application Development
Scalable, secure web applications built with .NET Core, Angular and React. From internal tools to customer-facing platforms — we engineer for performance and growth.
Learn more →
Mobile App Development
Native and cross-platform apps for iOS and Android. We build with React Native and Flutter for speed, or go fully native when your product demands it.
Learn more →
AI Development
We integrate automation, generative AI and intelligent features directly into your product. LLM integrations, AI-powered analysis tools, and smart workflows — from day one.
Learn more →
SaaS Product Development
Multi-tenant architecture, subscription billing, user management — we've built SaaS platforms that scaled to millions.
Learn more →
Cloud Migration
Move to Microsoft Azure or other cloud platforms with confidence. We handle the migration, optimize costs, and ensure zero downtime so your business keeps running.
Learn more →
How we work

Our process

01
Discover & Analyze
We collaborate closely with your team to discover and define your objectives and needs, creating a personalized plan of action.
Stakeholder interviews Requirements analysis Personalized action plan
02
Brainstorm
We organize group-oriented idea generation sessions to foster creativity, solve problems, and bring innovation to your product.
Ideation workshops Feature prioritization Solution concepts
03
Design & Prototype
We design your product adhering to contemporary UI/UX practices and approaches. With prototypes we bring that design to life in a tangible, interactive model for your testing and validation.
UI/UX design Interactive prototype User testing Design validation
04
Development & Testing
Our cross-functional team works on a set of features in usually 2-week sprints, aiming to produce a potentially shippable increment of your product. We present to you the work completed during the sprint, looking for your feedback and further improvement.
2-week sprints Sprint demos QA & testing Continuous feedback
05
Deployment
The final stage where we deliver the software to your end-users. Our team will install, configure and test the deliverables in all different environments and provide proper documentation and training materials.
Environment setup Configuration & testing Documentation Training materials
06
Feedback & Support
We provide ongoing assistance to make sure your product thrives and meets its full potential in the market.
Ongoing support Performance monitoring Iterative improvements

Our story

We did not start as an agency.
We started as builders.

For over 25 years, the same team has been shipping software that organisations depend on. That track record is what you get when you work with us.

Our story

Same team. New chapter.

The core of Dextrasoft is a team that spent over two decades building one of the Netherlands' leading procurement platforms — Negometrix. When it was acquired by Mercell, we did not scatter. We started Dextrasoft.

Early 2000s
Team comes together around Negometrix
A small group of developers in Sofia begins building an e-procurement platform for the Dutch market.
2009
NX3 launches
A full platform rebuild. Negometrix grows to serve hundreds of Dutch organisations.
2017
NX4 — the enterprise version
A second full rebuild. The platform now handles billions in public procurement contracts annually.
2022
Negometrix acquired by Mercell
One of Europe's leading procurement companies acquires Negometrix. The team stays together.
Today
Dextrasoft — a new chapter
Same people, same standards. Now building for companies across the Netherlands and beyond.

What makes us different.

01
We have built at enterprise scale before
Negometrix was used by thousands of organisations and processed billions in contracts. That is not agency experience — that is product experience. We know what breaks at scale because we have been there.
02
Permanent employees, not contractors
Every developer who works on your project is a permanent Dextrasoft employee. Not placed by an agency, not on a short contract. The team that starts your project finishes it.
03
Small teams, full accountability
We work in teams of 3 to 6. Every person on the team knows your project in detail. No handoffs, no knowledge gaps, no junior developers hidden behind a senior face.
04
Long-term by default
Most of our clients have worked with us for years. We do not deliver and disappear. We stay involved after launch, keep improving the product and treat your software as our own.
Our team

The people behind
the work.

27 permanent employees. Developers, designers, business analysts, QA engineers and product owners. Most of them have been here for over a decade.

Services › Web Application Development

Web applications build
to last and build to scale

From internal tools to enterprise platforms, we've been building complex web applications for over 25 years — the same team that built Negometrix from scratch, now building yours.

Every type of web application,
built properly.

We have built everything from lightweight internal tools to complex enterprise platforms with hundreds of thousands of users. Most of our projects have in common: they are architected to grow, maintained for speed, and delivered on time.

🚀
SaaS platforms
Multi-tenant platforms with subscription billing, role-based access, user management, and scalable architecture.
🔧
Internal tools and portals
Operational dashboards, workflow automation, and internal platforms that replace spreadsheets and disconnected systems — fast to build, easy to maintain.
💡
Legacy modernization
We rebuild outdated systems (10+ years old) without data loss, downtime, or disruption — leaving you with a modern, maintainable codebase.
🏛️
Marketplace and auction platforms
Two-sided platforms with real-time bidding, digital contracts, and KYC flows.
🔌
API development and integrations
REST and GraphQL APIs, third-party integrations, and system connectors — making your stack work as one without manual data transfers.
📊
Records and content platforms
Systems for managing contracts, documents, and compliance — including digital signing, versioning, audit trails, and KYC integrations.

FAQ

What technologies do you work with?
Our core stack is .NET Core on the backend with Angular or React on the frontend. We also work with Python, Node.js and Vue depending on the project. For cloud hosting we default to Azure, but we deploy to AWS and Google Cloud as well.
How long does a typical web application take to build?
A focused MVP typically takes 10–14 weeks from kickoff to production. More complex platforms — with multi-tenancy, complex workflows, or integrations — take 4–9 months. We will give you a realistic timeline after a scoping session, not an optimistic one.
Do you also do UX/UI design?
Yes. Design is part of our process, not an add-on. We have designers who work alongside developers from day one. We do not hand off a Figma file and disappear — the same team takes the design through to production.
Can you take over an existing codebase?
Yes. We start with a code audit to give you an honest assessment of what we are dealing with. We have modernised systems built in .NET 2.0, WebForms, and other legacy stacks — without losing data or uptime.
What happens after launch?
Most of our clients continue with us after launch. We offer ongoing development retainers, maintenance contracts, and on-call support. We do not build and disappear — the team that built it stays involved.

Ready to build something that lasts?

Services › Mobile App Development

Mobile App Development

iOS, Android and cross-platform apps built by a team that has been shipping mobile software for over a decade. Fast to market, built to last, designed to scale.

Mobile apps for every use case.

We have built everything from lightweight internal tools to complex enterprise platforms with hundreds of thousands of users. Most of our projects have in common: they are architected to grow, maintained for speed, and delivered on time.

📱
Consumer apps
High-performance iOS and Android apps with polished UX and App Store–ready quality.
🔧
B2B mobile tools
Field service, inspection, and operational apps for teams working outside the office.
🔌
Platform extensions
Two-sided platforms with real-time bidding, digital contracts, and KYC flows.
🏪
Marketplace apps
Two-sided platforms connecting buyers and sellers, with real-time data and payment integrations.
📊
Data collection apps
Forms, photos, GPS, and offline sync — built for capturing data in the field without reliable internet.
⚡
Real-time apps
Messaging, tracking, notifications, and live systems such as bidding or monitoring — updated instantly.

Which approach is right for you?

The right choice depends on your audience, timeline and budget. Here is an honest breakdown to help you decide.

🍎
Native iOS
Best performance and full access to Apple platform features. Right when your audience is iOS-only and deep device integration matters.
Swift / Objective-C
🤖
Native Android
Best for Android-dominant global user base. Right when your audience skews heavily Android or you need deep device integration.
Kotlin / Java
🔄
Cross-platform
One codebase for both platforms. Faster and cheaper to build. Right for most B2B tools and consumer apps that budget rather matters.
React Native / Flutter
FeatureNative iOSNative AndroidCross-platform
Time to market~ Longer~ Longer✓ Fastest
Cost~ Higher~ Higher✓ Lowest
Platform-specific features✓ Full✓ Full~ Most
Our recommendation for most projectsSpecific casesSpecific cases✓ Default choice

Mobile products we have shipped.

From consumer-facing apps to enterprise field tools — all built and maintained by our in-house team.

TreebyTree
Mobile app for a billion-tree mission
A scalable mobile application powering TreebyTree's global mission to plant one billion trees. Built for reliability in low-connectivity environments, with GPS-based planting verification, real-time impact tracking, and a cross-platform foundation to reach users worldwide.
React NativeGPSOffline syncImpact
1Btree mission
askemo
Mobile-first feedback platform
A cross-platform mobile application enabling real-time employee and customer feedback collection. Integrated with an AI backend to automatically summarise responses and surface actionable insights — available on iOS and Android with offline support for field use.
FlutterAI integrationiOS & Android
B2BSaaS mobile

FAQ

Do you handle App Store and Google Play submission?
Yes. We manage the full submission process for both stores, including preparing the listing, screenshots, descriptions and handling review feedback. We know the common rejection reasons and how to avoid them.
Should we build native or cross-platform?
For most B2B tools and consumer apps, React Native or Flutter is the right choice — faster, cheaper and the quality is indistinguishable from native for 90% of use cases. We will tell you honestly if your use case needs native.
Can you take over an existing app?
Yes. We start with a code audit and give you an honest picture of what we are taking on. We have modernised apps built by multiple different teams left in an inconsistent state.
How do you test on real devices?
We test on a range of physical iOS and Android devices throughout the project. Every sprint we deliver a working build you can install directly on your phone. No emulator-only surprises at the end.
What happens after launch?
We provide ongoing support, monitoring and feature development. Most of our mobile clients continue working with us after launch — adding features and updating for new OS versions.

Tell us about your project. We will tell you how we would build it — honestly, with a realistic timeline and no overselling.

Book a free call → See our work
Services › AI Development

AI that actually
does something.

We don't add AI to products as an afterthought. We identify where it creates real value, build exactly that, and integrate it from day one — not bolted on later.

Three ways we apply AI
to your product.

We do not build AI for the sake of it. We look at your product, identify where AI creates real value, and build exactly that.

⚡
Process automation
Repetitive tasks slow teams down. We identify the workflows in your product that can be automated and build the tooling to handle them — so your team focuses on work that actually needs a human.
💬
Generative AI & copilots
Chatbots, smart assistants and AI copilots built directly into your product. Trained on your data, designed for your users, integrated into your existing workflows rather than bolted on as a separate tool.
🔗
AI integrations
You do not always need to rebuild from scratch. We connect existing AI capabilities from OpenAI, Azure AI and others to your current software stack — extending what you already have without starting over.

When AI makes sense.
And when it doesn't.

A lot of companies add AI to their pitch decks. We only add it where it genuinely saves time, reduces manual work, or makes the user experience measurably better. We will tell you honestly if your use case is not ready for it.

✓AI works well when
  • There is a high volume of repetitive decisions or classifications
  • Users regularly interact with large amounts of unstructured text or data
  • The task has a clear output that can be validated or corrected
  • Speed matters more than perfection on every individual result
  • You have enough data to train or fine-tune a model meaningfully
~Think carefully when
  • The problem could be solved more reliably with a well-designed form or rule
  • The output has serious consequences if it is wrong
  • You have very little existing data to work from
  • The user cannot easily detect or correct an AI mistake
  • The main benefit is the word "AI" in a product description

AI we have already built.

Not hypothetical. Here is how we have applied AI in products we built for real clients.

askemo
AI-generated feedback summaries
We integrated AI into Askemo's platform to automatically summarise user feedback and turn it into concrete, actionable advice. What used to take hours of manual reading now happens in seconds.
OpenAIText analysisAutomation
Tender.app
AI data extraction from tender documents
We built AI-powered data extraction into Tender.app, automatically pulling structured information from complex tender documents. Less manual input, fewer errors, faster processing.
Document AIData extractionLLM

FAQ

Do we need a lot of data to get started with AI?
Not always. For integrations using foundation models like GPT-4 or Claude, you can get started with very little proprietary data. For fine-tuning or training custom models, we will tell you honestly what volume you need before the results are reliable.
Which AI models do you work with?
We work with OpenAI (GPT-4, Embeddings), Anthropic (Claude), Azure AI, and open-source models depending on your requirements for cost, privacy, and performance. We are model-agnostic — we pick what is right for your use case, not what is newest.
How do you handle data privacy and security?
We design AI features with privacy by default. For sensitive data we can use on-premise or private cloud deployments, avoid sending personal data to third-party APIs, and build audit trails so you always know what the AI did and why.
What happens when the AI gets it wrong?
We always build with fallbacks. AI outputs are never shown to users without a confidence threshold or a human review step where the stakes are high. We also build monitoring so you can see error rates over time and know when retraining is needed.
Can you add AI to our existing product?
Yes, and that is often the fastest path. We start with a technical review of your current stack and identify the integration points. In most cases we can deliver a working AI feature into an existing product in 4–6 weeks.

Services › SaaS Product Development

From idea to SaaS platform.
Built to scale to millions.

Multi-tenant architecture, subscription billing, user management — we have built SaaS platforms that processed billions in transactions and scaled to thousands of organisations. That experience is now yours.

Every layer of a SaaS product,
covered.

We build SaaS products end to end — from architecture decisions on day one to the features your customers will use on day 1,000.

🏗️
Multi-tenant architecture
Proper tenant isolation, shared infrastructure where it saves money, separate where it matters for compliance or performance. Built right from the start.
💳
Subscription & billing
Stripe, Mollie, or custom billing logic — usage-based, seat-based, or flat fee. Trial periods, upgrades, invoicing and dunning handled properly.
👥
User & permission management
Role-based access control, organisation hierarchies, SSO and social login. Complex permission models that stay maintainable as you grow.
📈
Analytics & reporting
Embedded dashboards, data exports, and usage analytics — giving your customers visibility into their data and giving you visibility into how they use your product.
🔗
Integrations & API
Public APIs, webhooks, and native integrations with the tools your customers already use. Built to be a platform, not just a product.
🔒
Security & compliance
GDPR-compliant by design. Audit logs, data residency options, penetration testing support, and the documentation your enterprise customers will ask for.

Where are you in your journey?

We work with SaaS companies at every stage. Tell us where you are and we will tell you exactly how we can help.

01
Pre-product
You have an idea, not yet a product
We help you scope what to build first, design the right architecture for the future you are planning, and ship a working MVP in 10–14 weeks — without the technical debt that most early-stage products carry.
  • Product scoping & technical architecture
  • MVP in 10–14 weeks
  • Built to scale from day one
02
Growing
You have paying customers and need to move faster
We embed into your team or take ownership of specific workstreams. We help you ship features faster, deal with scaling problems before they become crises, and reduce the maintenance burden of moving quickly in the early days.
  • Dedicated development team
  • Performance & scalability work
  • Feature development at pace
03
Established
You have a mature product that needs modernising
Legacy codebases slow teams down and make every new feature harder than it should be. We modernise without stopping your product — migrating architecture, improving test coverage, and clearing the technical debt that is holding you back.
  • Legacy modernisation
  • Architecture migration
  • Technical debt reduction

SaaS products we have built.

Two flagship products built from zero — one acquired, one still growing.

Negometrix
Netherlands' leading e-procurement SaaS — acquired by Mercell
Built from zero to the dominant e-procurement platform in the Netherlands. Full multi-tenant architecture, complex tendering workflows, document management, supplier portals and a public API — serving thousands of public and private organisations before being acquired by Mercell, one of Europe's largest procurement platforms.
Multi-tenant SaaS.NET12+ yearsAcquired
1000sorganisations
12+years in production
askemo
AI-powered employee & customer feedback SaaS
A B2B SaaS platform for collecting and analysing employee and customer feedback at scale. We built the platform from scratch — multi-tenant, subscription-based, with an AI layer that automatically summarises feedback and surfaces actionable insights. Integrated with HR tools and accessible via web and mobile.

B2BSaaS product

FAQ

How long does it take to build a SaaS MVP?
A focused MVP with core features — user auth, billing, the main product workflow — typically takes 10–14 weeks. We scope carefully before we start so the estimate is realistic, not optimistic.
Do you help with product strategy and architecture?
Yes. Before writing a line of code we work with you on what to build first, how to architect it for the future you are planning, and what to leave out of the MVP. Most SaaS problems start with bad early decisions — we help you avoid the common ones.
Can you integrate payment processing and subscriptions?
Yes. We work with Stripe, Mollie and custom billing logic. Usage-based, seat-based, flat fee, or hybrid — we have built all of them. Trial periods, upgrade flows, invoicing, dunning and revenue reporting included.
Do you build multi-tenant SaaS platforms?
Yes, and this is something we have done for over 12 years with Negometrix. We know the tradeoffs between shared database, schema-per-tenant, and database-per-tenant — and we will help you pick the right model for your use case and budget.
What happens after the MVP launches?
Most of our SaaS clients continue with us on a retainer for ongoing development. We stay involved — shipping new features, monitoring performance, and evolving the architecture as your user base grows. We do not hand over and disappear.

Services › Cloud Migration

Move to the cloud.
No surprises. No downtime.

We migrate legacy systems to modern cloud platforms — AWS, Azure, Google Cloud. Zero-downtime transitions, full data integrity, and a clear plan from start to finish.

Every type of cloud migration.

Whether you are lifting-and-shifting a monolith or re-architecting for microservices, we handle migrations of all shapes and sizes — from on-premise data centers to modern cloud infrastructure.

☁️
On-premise to Azure
Move your servers, databases, and applications to Microsoft Azure. We handle setup, configuration, and cutover so your team can stay focused on the business.
🔧
Cloud provider switching
Moving from AWS or Google Cloud to Azure (or the other way around). We map dependencies, rebuild where needed, and minimize switching costs.
📋
Application modernisation
Migration is the right moment to modernise. We re-architect legacy systems into cloud-native services that scale better and cost less to run.
💾
Database migration
SQL Server, PostgreSQL, and other databases migrated to managed cloud solutions — with full data integrity validation before and after.
🔒
Security and compliance
GDPR-compliant cloud setups, EU data residency, and secure configurations from day one.
📉
Cost optimisation
We design your cloud environment to scale efficiently — so you only pay for what you actually use.

Where are you right now?

The right migration approach depends entirely on your current infrastructure. Tell us where you are starting from and we will map the path forward.

01
Still on-premise
Servers in your own data center or co-location
You are paying for hardware, managing physical infrastructure, and dealing with the limitations of a fixed capacity. We plan a full lift-and-shift or re-architecture migration with zero-downtime cutover and a tested rollback plan.
  • Full infrastructure audit & mapping
  • Staged migration with rollback checkpoints
  • Zero-downtime production cutover
02
Hybrid or partial cloud
Some workloads in the cloud, some still on-premise
You have started the journey but ended up with complexity in both places. We audit what is running where, rationalise the architecture, and complete the move — so you are not paying for two environments or managing the gap between them.
  • Hybrid architecture review
  • Dependency mapping across environments
  • Consolidated cloud-first architecture
03
Already in the cloud
Cloud infrastructure that is costing too much or not scaling well
You made the move but the architecture was not optimised — costs are higher than expected, scaling is manual, or you are on a provider that no longer fits. We audit your current setup, right-size resources, and redesign where needed.
  • Cloud cost audit & right-sizing
  • Provider migration if needed
  • Auto-scaling & performance improvements

Cloud migrations we have delivered.

Every migration here was done without data loss and without downtime that the business could not absorb.

Electronic Public Procurement (EPP)
National procurement platform — cloud-first architecture
Designed and deployed a cloud-first infrastructure for Bulgaria's national public procurement platform. Azure-based architecture with high availability, EU data residency compliance, and the scalability to handle thousands of concurrent public authorities without performance degradation.
AzureHigh availabilityEU data residencyGovTech
Nationalscale infrastructure
Negometrix
Legacy .NET platform migrated to Azure — zero downtime
Over twelve years we evolved Negometrix from an on-premise deployment to a fully managed Azure infrastructure — including Azure SQL, Azure App Service, Azure DevOps pipelines and active monitoring. The platform continued operating without interruption throughout, serving thousands of organisations during the transition.
Azure.NET migrationZero downtimeContinuous delivery
Zerodowntime incidents
12+years maintained

FAQ

How long does a typical cloud migration take?
For most production systems the full migration takes 8–12 weeks. This includes the audit, planning, staging environment testing, and the production cutover. We do not compress the timeline in ways that increase risk — we give you a realistic schedule and stick to it.
Will there be downtime during migration?
Our goal is always zero downtime. We use blue-green deployments, traffic shifting, and tested rollback procedures so the cutover is invisible to your users. For systems where some maintenance window is unavoidable, we plan it for the lowest-traffic period and keep it as short as possible.
Which cloud provider do you recommend?
For most of our clients Azure is the right choice — especially if you are running .NET applications or need EU data residency and enterprise compliance. We have 20+ years of Microsoft ecosystem experience. That said, we are not tied to a vendor — if your use case points to AWS or Google Cloud, we will tell you honestly.
Do you handle data migration and validation?
Yes. Data integrity is the highest-risk part of any migration. We run parallel validation before cutting over — comparing row counts, checksums, and business-logic outputs between the old and new environment until we are confident nothing was lost or corrupted.
What does post-migration support look like?
We stay on-call for the first weeks after go-live, monitoring performance, cost, and error rates. Most clients continue with a maintenance retainer after that — covering patches, scaling adjustments, and the occasional architectural change as the product evolves.

Projects › Negometrix

Negometrix

Client
Negometrix
Services
SaaS, Web Application, Enterprise
Tech stack
.NETAngularSQL ServerAzureAzure DevOps
Start a project →

Overview

Negometrix was a Dutch e-procurement platform built entirely by the Dextrasoft team. Over twelve years we took the product from zero to the dominant e-tendering solution in the Netherlands, serving thousands of public and private organisations before its acquisition by Mercell — one of Europe's largest procurement platforms.

The challenge

Public procurement is a compliance-heavy, high-stakes domain. The platform needed to support complex tendering workflows, multi-tenant isolation, a supplier portal, document management, and a public API — all while meeting the strict reliability expectations of government clients. Every new release had to go out without downtime.

Our solution

We built the platform on .NET with a full multi-tenant architecture, designing the data model and infrastructure from day one to support the scale we knew was coming. We launched NX3 in 2009, then rebuilt and relaunched as NX4 in 2017 with a modern frontend and improved architecture. The same team delivered every sprint, every release, every migration.

Results

The platform scaled to thousands of organisations across the Netherlands, processing billions in contract value. After twelve years of continuous development the product was acquired by Mercell, validating both the technical quality and the market position we had built together.

12+years in production
1000sorganisations
Acquiredby Mercell

"Working with the Dextrasoft team was a game-changer. Their expertise in building scalable platforms helped us grow to become the leading e-procurement solution in the Netherlands."

Michael Chen, CEO — Negometrix

Projects › askemo

askemo

Client
askemo
Services
AI Integration, SaaS, Web & Mobile
Tech stack
.NETFlutterOpenAIAzurePostgreSQL
Start a project →

Overview

askemo is a B2B SaaS platform for collecting and analysing employee and customer feedback at scale. Dextrasoft built the platform from scratch — multi-tenant, subscription-based, with an AI layer that automatically summarises feedback and surfaces actionable insights.

The challenge

The core problem was volume. Collecting feedback is easy — making sense of thousands of responses across multiple clients, languages and departments without a manual reading process was the real challenge. The platform also needed to be simple enough for non-technical HR teams to use daily.

Our solution

We designed and built the full platform including user management, multi-tenant data isolation, a mobile-first frontend, and an AI integration that uses large language models to summarise feedback threads and generate concrete, prioritised recommendations. What used to take a team hours of reading now happens automatically in seconds.

Results

The platform launched on schedule and has been running in production without major incidents. Customers report significantly reduced time spent on feedback analysis, and the AI summaries have become the most-used feature in the product.

Hoursreduced to seconds
Multi-tenantSaaS platform
iOS & Androidmobile apps

"Our platform is easier to use and future-proof. Our customers and our own team are really happy with the results. On top the collaboration has been great: pro-active, professional, open and honest."

Roel Schellekens, CEO — askemo

Projects › Electronic Public Procurement

Electronic Public Procurement

Client
Electronic Public Procurement
Services
GovTech, Enterprise, Web Application
Tech stack
.NETReactAzureSQL ServerAzure DevOps
Start a project →

Overview

Electronic Public Procurement (EPP) is the platform powering Bulgaria's national public procurement process. Dextrasoft designed and built the cloud-first infrastructure and core platform, replacing a fragmented legacy system with a centralised, auditable, scalable solution for thousands of public authorities.

The challenge

Government procurement involves strict compliance requirements, complex legal workflows, and the expectation of zero downtime. The legacy system was fragmented, difficult to audit, and could not handle the transaction volume required. A national-scale platform needed to be built with reliability, security, and EU data residency as non-negotiable constraints.

Our solution

We built a modern web platform on .NET with Azure cloud infrastructure, designing for high availability from the ground up. The system includes complete audit trails, document management, supplier portals, and a reporting layer for oversight bodies. EU data residency and GDPR compliance were designed in, not added later.

Results

The platform is live and processing public procurement for thousands of Bulgarian authorities. The modernisation reduced processing times, improved transparency, and gave procurement officers a system they can actually use — replacing a process that previously relied on paper and disconnected spreadsheets.

Nationalscale deployment
1000spublic authorities
EUdata residency compliant

"Dextrasoft delivered a complex public procurement platform on time and on budget. Their team was professional, communicative and technically exceptional throughout the entire project."

Anna Petrova, Project Director — EPP

Projects › NVZ

NVZ

Client
NVZ
Services
Healthcare, Web Application, Portal
Tech stack
.NETAngularAzureSQL Server
Start a project →

Overview

NVZ is the association of Dutch hospitals. Dextrasoft built a bespoke web platform to streamline communication, data exchange, and reporting across the NVZ member network — replacing manual processes with a modern, centralised system that all member hospitals can access and use.

The challenge

Managing information flow across a large network of independent hospital organisations is inherently complex. Each member has different data needs, different internal systems, and different levels of technical capability. The platform needed to be flexible enough to serve all of them without becoming a maintenance nightmare.

Our solution

We designed a portal architecture with role-based access control, allowing different member organisations to see and manage their own data while NVZ administrators maintain oversight of the full network. The platform includes reporting dashboards, document management, and notification workflows tailored to the needs of the healthcare sector.

Results

The platform is in active use across the NVZ member network. Member organisations report improved efficiency in data collection and reporting, and NVZ has gained the network-wide visibility they needed to serve their members more effectively.

Healthcaresector platform
Nationalhospital network
Custombuilt for NVZ

"Dextrasoft built a custom platform that boosted efficiency across our hospital network. The results exceeded our expectations significantly."

Dr. van Berg, Operations — NVZ

Projects › treebytree

treebytree

Client
treebytree
Services
Mobile App, Cloud, Impact
Tech stack
React NativeNode.jsAzurePostgreSQLGPS SDK
Start a project →

Overview

treebytree is on a mission to plant one billion trees. Dextrasoft built the technical foundation — a cross-platform mobile application and backend infrastructure — designed to support a global community of tree planters and make every planted tree trackable, verifiable, and impactful.

The challenge

The application needed to work reliably in remote, low-connectivity environments where trees are actually being planted. GPS-based verification, offline data capture, photo uploads, and real-time impact tracking all had to work when mobile signal was poor or absent — and sync reliably when connectivity returned.

Our solution

We built a React Native cross-platform app with a robust offline-first architecture. Tree planting events are captured locally with GPS coordinates, photos, and species data, then synced to the cloud when connectivity is available. The backend infrastructure is designed to scale as the user base and planting volumes grow.

Results

The app is live on iOS and Android, supporting the treebytree mission across multiple countries. The offline-first approach has proven critical in the field, and the platform provides the transparency and verifiability that treebytree's partners and donors need to trust the impact data.

1 Billiontree mission
Offline-firstarchitecture
iOS & Androidcross-platform

"From the first call to the final deployment, Dextrasoft felt like part of our own team. They understood our vision and built something we are genuinely proud of."

Lars Janssen, CTO — treebytree

Projects › Tender.app

Tender.app

Client
Tender.app
Services
AI Integration, Automation, Enterprise
Tech stack
.NETOpenAIAzureDocument AIReact
Start a project →

Overview

Tender.app helps procurement professionals manage and respond to tenders more efficiently. Dextrasoft integrated an AI-powered data extraction layer that automatically pulls structured information from complex, unstructured tender documents — eliminating the manual reading that was slowing down their users.

The challenge

Tender documents can run to hundreds of pages, written in inconsistent formats across different contracting authorities. Procurement teams were spending hours extracting key requirements, deadlines, evaluation criteria, and submission instructions from each document — time that could be better spent on the actual response.

Our solution

We built an AI integration using large language models to parse tender documents and extract structured data: deadlines, requirements, evaluation criteria, contact details, and submission formats. The extracted data populates the Tender.app workspace automatically, giving users a clean structured summary of what they need to know and do.

Results

Users reported dramatically reduced time on document analysis. The AI extraction handles documents across multiple languages and formats, and the structured output integrates directly into the tender management workflow already inside the product.

Hoursof reading automated
Multi-languagedocument support
Directworkflow integration

"The AI integration has transformed how our users handle tender documents. What used to take hours now happens in seconds — and the accuracy is impressive."

Product Team — Tender.app

Projects › Mart-club

Mart-club

Client
Mart-club
Services
Marketplace, Web Application, SaaS
Tech stack
.NETReactPostgreSQLAzureStripe
Start a project →

Overview

Mart-club needed a modern marketplace platform to connect buyers and sellers at scale. Dextrasoft built the end-to-end solution — vendor onboarding, product catalogue management, payment processing, order management, and real-time inventory tracking — as a scalable SaaS platform.

The challenge

Marketplace platforms are technically complex because they serve two different user groups simultaneously: buyers expecting a seamless shopping experience and vendors expecting reliable tools to manage their inventory and orders. Getting both sides right, without compromising on performance or reliability, required careful architecture from the start.

Our solution

We designed and built a multi-sided marketplace architecture with separate vendor and buyer portals, a shared product catalogue with real-time inventory, integrated payment processing, and an order management system with automated status tracking. The platform was built to scale horizontally as vendor and product volumes grew.

Results

The platform successfully onboarded vendors and buyers, supporting real-time transactions with reliable inventory management. The architecture has allowed Mart-club to expand their catalogue and vendor base without performance degradation.

Multi-sidedmarketplace
Real-timeinventory sync
Integratedpayment processing

"The team delivered exactly what we needed — a platform that works for both our vendors and our buyers, without compromise on either side."

Product Team — Mart-club

Projects › ECX / Office of General Services

ECX / Office of General Services

Client
ECX / Office of General Services
Services
Government, Marketplace, Web Application
Tech stack
.NETAngularAzureSQL Server
Start a project →

Overview

The Office of General Services for New York State needed a modern digital platform for state vehicle procurement — replacing a fragmented legacy system with a centralised, auditable marketplace that state agencies could use to find, compare, and procure fleet vehicles.

The challenge

Government procurement has unique constraints: strict audit requirements, complex approval workflows, multi-agency access control, and the expectation that the system will be reliable during business-critical procurement cycles. The legacy process was slow, difficult to audit, and required significant manual intervention.

Our solution

We built a modern web marketplace platform designed specifically for government procurement workflows. The system includes multi-agency access control, full audit trails for every action, a vendor catalogue with standardised vehicle specifications, and an approval workflow engine that supports the multi-step sign-off processes required in government purchasing.

Results

The platform went live and is used by state agencies across New York for vehicle procurement. Procurement officers report faster processing times, better visibility into available options, and a significant reduction in the manual coordination previously required.

US Governmentclient
Multi-agencyaccess control
Fullaudit trail

"The platform has significantly improved how our agencies manage vehicle procurement. The audit trail and approval workflows were exactly what we needed."

Procurement Team — Office of General Services, NY
